rationale: Both reviews identify the identical scope violations in the exact diff (AffineAlgGroup bundling at l.34, naive IsUnipotent nilpotence test at l.48, and Reductive/Semisimple stubs with True at l.60/65 before any Layers 0-5 exist), and both prescribe the same corrective action (remove/split these until the roadmap prerequisites land). Acting on either therefore yields the identical improved PR.
